steps.title: Recognize the y-intercept in linear form
steps.content: The function $f(t) = 14t + 9$ is a linear function of the form $f(t) = mt + b$. The constant term $b = 9$ is the y-intercept — the value of the function when $t = 0$. Since $t$ represents months after purchase, $t = 0$ corresponds to the moment of purchase.

steps.title: Evaluate and match to the correct choice
steps.content: At purchase ($t = 0$): $$f(0) = 14(0) + 9 = 9 \text{ inches}$$ The estimated length is 9 inches when purchased. Checking the choices: A refers to duration, B incorrectly claims 9 is the monthly growth (it's actually 14), and C incorrectly claims 9 is a maximum. Choice D correctly interprets 9 as the initial length. That matches choice D — D is correct.
